blocks.adaptorCaption: Price yourself online first. Call us when you'd like to proceed.
blocks.subtext: We'll beat any genuine quote by 30%. That's a promise in writing.
blocks.imageAlt: Double glazing upgrade in progress on a Melbourne home

blocks.heading: What do I want to achieve?
blocks.subtext: See your price per square metre for each option — all from standard 3mm clear window pane glass.
blocks.pressHint: Press any option to get your price.
blocks.eastWestBody: They get more heat. Choose Option C or D.
blocks.comparisonNote: The quieter and less-heat figures show the reduction from standard 3mm clear window glass.
blocks.measureInstruction: Measure the glass, not the frame. Enter height and width in millimetres.
blocks.measureNote: Same size three times? Enter one row and set quantity to 3.
blocks.noMeasurementsHint: Updates as you enter your windows above.
blocks.accuracyNote: If you've filled this out correctly, your price is accurate to within 10%.
blocks.measurementOffNote: If your measurements are off, the final quote may adjust slightly. We confirm everything on site before any work starts.
blocks.budgetPrompt: If this is within your budget, send your quote through — we'll call to confirm and book the install.
blocks.dialogDescription: We'll call to confirm and book your install.
blocks.modalErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
blocks.successBody: Once we confirm your quote you'll receive an email with your price locked in.

blocks.heading: About our adaptors
blocks.mobileSubtitle: Reduces the glass you see by ~40mm in height, 20mm each side. Tap to read more.
blocks.body1: We use special fittings to attach new glass to your existing frame. Our frame reduces the glass size you see by about 40mm overall in height, and 20mm per side, approximately — that is the only visible change. No ripping out, no plastering, no mess.
blocks.body2: This saves you thousands compared to full window replacement.

blocks.heading: Quote Generator FAQ
blocks.subheading: Common questions about the tool and how it works.

faqs.q: How accurate is the online price?
faqs.a: Within about 10%, as long as your measurements are correct. We confirm the final figure when we measure on site.

faqs.q: How do I measure my windows?
faqs.a: Measure each individual piece, height and width.
50% deposit to start fabrication — your glass is custom-made — then the remaining 50% once your install is scheduled. No surprise fees.

faqs.q: What is the second storey surcharge?
faqs.a: Second storey windows are harder to access, so we add a flat $150 per window. Tick the second storey box on any row and the calculator includes it.

faqs.q: Will the adaptor change how my window looks?
faqs.a: Our frame reduces the glass size you see by about 40mm overall in height, and 20mm per side, approximately. This is how we fit insulated glass into your existing frames without replacing them — most customers don't notice the difference after install.
Our 10-year warranty covers the glass unit, the seals, and our workmanship. If anything fails within that time, we come back and fix it — no charge.

faqs.q: How long from quote to install?
faqs.a: Once your deposit is in, fabrication typically takes 2–3 weeks. We'll confirm your install date as soon as materials are ready.

faqs.q: Do I have to give my email to see the price?
faqs.a: No. Your price appears as you enter your windows — no email or phone number needed. Send it through only when you're ready to proceed.
Yes. Every quote includes glass, installation, frame preparation, rubbish removal, and 10-year warranty. No hidden extras.

faqs.q: What if I already have a quote from someone else?
faqs.a: Send it to us. If it's a genuine quote, we'll beat it by 30% — guaranteed in writing, same 10-year warranty.
